landing.heroDescription: Silah connects your cases to Saudi regulations using AI. Manage cases, track regulation changes, and collaborate with your team — all in one bilingual platform.
landing.heroCaseDesc: The employer terminated the contract without notice or valid cause, violating labor law provisions.
landing.heroAlertsDesc: The platform tracks related regulations and alerts your team when a material change is published.
landing.heroVersionDesc: Compare versions side by side and review what changed with concise legal summaries.
landing.heroSearchTitle: Search and Ask AI Across Your Data
landing.heroSearchDesc: Run one legal search across cases and regulations and get a direct legal answer with sources.
landing.heroSearchFooter: Results include linked case and regulation references
landing.featuresSubtitle: A single platform that handles case management, AI-powered regulation matching, document storage, and team collaboration for Saudi legal professionals.
landing.aiMatchingDesc: Analyzes case facts and documents, then suggests the most relevant regulations with plain-language rationale and text evidence.
landing.regulationAlertsDesc: Get notified when any regulation linked to your active cases is updated, amended, or repealed.
landing.caseManagementDesc: Track cases, manage client information, assign tasks to team members, and monitor deadlines from a single dashboard.
landing.documentProcessingDesc: Upload PDFs and documents. The system extracts text and links content to relevant cases.
landing.realTimeUpdates: Regulation Version Tracking and Change Comparison
landing.realTimeUpdatesDesc: Compare any two regulation versions and review clear summaries and explanations.
landing.teamManagement: Search and Ask AI Across Your Data
landing.teamManagementDesc: Search across your cases and regulations in one place, with AI delivering clear legal answers and practical summaries.
landing.documentStorageDesc: Store, organize, and search case documents with version tracking and access control.
landing.solutionsSubtitle: Silah is designed for law firms, corporate legal departments, solo practitioners, and legal consultants operating in Saudi Arabia.
landing.lawFirmsDesc: Manage multiple cases across your team. AI regulation matching reduces research time so lawyers can focus on strategy and client service.
landing.legalDeptsDesc: Centralize compliance tracking, contract management, and litigation in one platform with organization-level data isolation.
landing.soloLawyersDesc: Access the same AI tools and case management features used by larger firms, at a price designed for individual practitioners.
landing.consultantsDesc: Search regulations instantly and get AI-verified matches to provide faster, more accurate advice to your clients.
landing.technologyTitle: How AI Matches Regulations to Your Case
landing.technologySubtitle: Silah uses a multi-stage AI pipeline to find and verify the most relevant Saudi regulations for each case.
landing.step1Desc: Your case description is converted into embeddings using the BGE-M3 multilingual model, then matched against all stored regulations by meaning — not just keywords.
landing.step2Desc: Results are scored using four factors: meaning similarity, evidence strength, lexical overlap, and case type fit. Each factor's weight can be adjusted.
landing.step3Desc: Top matches are verified by Gemini LLM to confirm legal relevance, then optionally reranked using cross-encoder and ColBERT models for precision.
landing.techBilingualDesc: BGE-M3 model handles both languages natively with full RTL interface support.
landing.techSpeedDesc: Optimized pipeline returns regulation matches in under half a second.
landing.techSecurityDesc: Each organization's data is isolated. Role-based access controls limit what each user can see and do.
landing.metric2Desc: More than 20 systems in the platform
landing.metric3Desc: Trained on about 50k Saudi legal cases
landing.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. No long-term contracts. Choose the plan that fits your practice.
landing.proFeature2: Full AI pipeline with all matching stages
landing.ctaDescription: See how Silah connects your cases to the right Saudi regulations automatically — so you can focus on strategy, not research.
landing.noCreditCard: Available for law firms, solo practitioners, and legal consultants.
landing.copyright: © 2026 Silah Legal Tech. Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.

wizard.createNewCaseDesc: Follow the guided steps to set up your case
wizard.whatType: What type of case is this?
wizard.selectCourtType: Select the court type that will hear this case
wizard.caseTitleHint: A clear, concise title that describes the nature of the case
wizard.caseTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Wrongful Termination – Employee vs. ABC Corp
wizard.caseDescriptionHint: Describe the case in detail — include parties, facts, and relief sought
wizard.caseDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the key facts, parties involved, and what relief is being sought...
wizard.aiHelperDesc: Answer these questions and we'll build your description
wizard.analyzingDetails: Analyzing your case details for completeness
wizard.title: Title
wizard.readyToCreate: Click "Create Case" below to save your case. You can always edit details later.
wizard.readyToUpdate: Click "Update Case" below to save your changes.
wizard.qPartiesPlaceholder: e.g. The plaintiff is John Doe, an employee at ABC Corp. The defendant is ABC Corp, a limited liability company...
wizard.qFactsPlaceholder: e.g. On January 15, 2026, the plaintiff was terminated without notice after 5 years of employment...
wizard.qReliefPlaceholder: e.g. Full payment of end-of-service benefits, compensation for wrongful termination, outstanding salary...
wizard.qDispute: What is the nature of the dispute?
wizard.qDisputePlaceholder: e.g. Property ownership dispute, traffic accident claim, civil debt recovery...
wizard.qEmploymentPlaceholder: e.g. Employment contract dated Jan 2021, position: Senior Developer, monthly salary: SAR 15,000...
wizard.qContractPlaceholder: e.g. Partnership agreement dated March 2024, supply contract #SC-2024-001, total value: SAR 500,000...
wizard.qOffensePlaceholder: e.g. Fraud charge under Article 4 of the Anti-Fraud Law, incident occurred on June 2025...
wizard.qFamily: What is the family/personal status matter?
wizard.qFamilyPlaceholder: e.g. Divorce proceedings, custody dispute for 2 minor children, inheritance distribution...
wizard.qGovernmentPlaceholder: e.g. Appeal against municipality decision, permit denial by the Ministry of Commerce...
wizard.qJudgment: What judgment or order needs enforcement?
wizard.qJudgmentPlaceholder: e.g. Court judgment #1234/2025 ordering payment of SAR 200,000, enforcement of custody order...
wizard.reviewTitleWarn: Title is short — consider adding more context (e.g. parties or dispute type)
wizard.reviewDescNone: No description provided — adding details will improve AI matching later
wizard.reviewDescBrief: Description is very brief — try adding more facts and context for better AI analysis
wizard.reviewDescAdequate: Description is adequate. For best AI matching, consider adding specific details about the parties and claims.
wizard.reviewDescGood: Description is detailed — great for AI analysis
wizard.reviewPartiesSugg: Consider mentioning the parties involved (plaintiff, defendant, etc.)
wizard.reviewTimelineSugg: Consider adding key dates and a timeline of events
wizard.reviewClaimsSugg: Consider specifying what relief or outcome is being sought
wizard.reviewClientSugg: No client specified — you can add this later from the case details page
wizard.reviewCourtSugg: No court specified — you can add this later from the case details page

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and preferences
settings.aiSettingsDesc: Control how regulation suggestions are generated, filtered, and explained.
settings.aiPipelineFeaturesDesc: Turn key quality checks on or off.
settings.llmVerificationDesc: Runs a final legal relevance check before showing suggestions.
settings.crossEncoderDesc: Improves ranking quality for the top candidate regulations.
settings.hydeDesc: Builds a draft legal query to improve difficult searches.
settings.colbertDesc: Performs deeper line-level matching for long regulation text.
settings.agenticRetrievalDesc: Runs additional search rounds to catch missing regulations.
settings.scoringWeightsDesc: Adjust how each legal relevance factor affects ranking.
settings.thresholdsDesc: Set the minimum quality required before a suggestion is shown.
settings.advancedTuningDesc: Detailed controls for performance and ranking depth.

settings.caseUpdatesDesc: Get notified when cases are updated, assigned, or have new activity.
